name: Brent Butt
bio: Brent Butt is a Canadian stand-up comedian, actor, and writer from Tisdale, Saskatchewan, known for a dry, prairie-rooted observational style. He first performed stand-up in 1988 and won the Canadian Comedy Award for Best Male Stand-up in 2001. He created and starred in the hit CTV sitcom Corner Gas, set in his home province, and later released The Brent Butt Comedy Special.

timeline.ev: Performs stand-up for the first time at a Saskatoon amateur night
Wins the Canadian Comedy Award for Best Male Stand-up
Creates and stars in the CTV sitcom Corner Gas
Releases The Brent Butt Comedy Special

accolades: Creator and star of the hit CTV sitcom Corner Gas
The Brent Butt Comedy Special on The Comedy Network
